/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rtviewer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtviewer.dir/editor_ui.cpp.o -o rtviewer  ../../rtfw-connect/librtfw-connect.a ../rtmonitor/libimgui_static.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so ../../rtfw-common/librtfw-common.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 -lpthread -lrt
